mapper.sql: (CASE WHEN COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(fc.deduct_fba_stock),1) = 1 THEN COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable),0) ELSE 0 END + CASE WHEN COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(fc.deduct_fba_inbound),1) = 1 THEN COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound),0) ELSE 0 END)
(CASE WHEN COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(fc.deduct_purchased_qty),1) = 1 THEN COALESCE(MAX(CAST(wd.quantity_receive AS SIGNED)),0) ELSE 0 END)

(CASE WHEN ANY_VALUE(fc.min_replenish_qty) IS NOT NULL AND ANY_VALUE(fc.max_replenish_qty) IS NOT NULL THEN LEAST(ANY_VALUE(fc.max_replenish_qty), GREATEST(ANY_VALUE(fc.min_replenish_qty), )) WHEN ANY_VALUE(fc.min_replenish_qty) IS NOT NULL THEN GREATEST(ANY_VALUE(fc.min_replenish_qty), ) WHEN ANY_VALUE(fc.max_replenish_qty) IS NOT NULL THEN LEAST(ANY_VALUE(fc.max_replenish_qty), ) ELSE END)
(CASE COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(fc.round_mode), 'NONE') WHEN 'CEIL' THEN CEIL() WHEN 'FLOOR' THEN FLOOR() WHEN 'ROUND' THEN ROUND(, 0) ELSE END)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO amz_replenishment_snapshot ( sid, seller_sku, warehouse_sku, warehouse_name, asin, tag_name, principal_name, store_name, product_category, rating, review_count, ad_rate, profit_rate_30d, refund_rate_90d, purchased_qty, domestic_stock, pending_ship_qty, fba_stock, fba_inbound, total_inventory, sales_7d, sales_14d, sales_30d, sales_60d, sales_speed_14d, sales_speed_30d, sales_speed_60d, avg_monthly_sales, safety_stock, ship_qty, replenish_qty, restock_days, region_group, image_url, calc_time, batch_no, current_flag ) SELECT COALESCE(pl.sid, 0) AS sid, pl.seller_sku AS seller_sku, wd.sku AS warehouse_sku, ANY_VALUE(wh.name) AS warehouse_name, ANY_VALUE(pl.asin) AS asin, ANY_VALUE(COALESCE(pl.tag_name, '')) AS tag_name, ANY_VALUE(pl.principal_name) AS principal_name, ANY_VALUE(COALESCE(sl.store_name, '')) AS store_name, ANY_VALUE(COALESCE(pc.category, '')) AS product_category, ANY_VALUE(NULLIF(pl.last_star, '')) AS rating, ANY_VALUE(pl.review_num) AS review_count, ANY_VALUE(op.spend_rate * 100) AS ad_rate, ANY_VALUE(op.gross_margin * 100) AS profit_rate_30d, ANY_VALUE(op.refund_amount_rate * 100) AS refund_rate_90d, CASE WHEN COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(fc.region_group), 'US') = 'EU' THEN COALESCE(MAX(CAST(wd.quantity_receive AS SIGNED)), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_qc_num), 0) ELSE COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_valid_num), 0) END AS purchased_qty, COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_valid_num), 0) AS domestic_stock, COALESCE(MAX(wd.product_lock_num), 0) AS pending_ship_qty, COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable), 0) AS fba_stock, COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound), 0) AS fba_inbound, COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound), 0) AS total_inventory, COALESCE(MAX(rs.sales_7d), 0) AS sales_7d, COALESCE(MAX(rs.sales_14d), 0) AS sales_14d, COALESCE(MAX(rs.sales_30d), 0) AS sales_30d, COALESCE(MAX(rs.sales_60d), 0) AS sales_60d, MAX(rs.avg_sales_14d) AS sales_speed_14d, MAX(rs.avg_sales_30d) AS sales_speed_30d, MAX(rs.avg_sales_60d) AS sales_speed_60d, ROUND( * COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(fc.month_multiplier),30), 2) AS avg_monthly_sales, ROUND( * COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(fc.safety_days),90), 2) AS safety_stock, ROUND( * COALESCE(ANY_VALUE(fc.ship_days),90), 2) - AS ship_qty, AS replenish_qty, ROUND(((COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_sellable),0) + COALESCE(MAX(rs.fba_inbound),0)) - ) / NULLIF(, 0), 2) AS restock_days, ANY_VALUE(COALESCE(fc.region_group, 'US')) AS region_group, ANY_VALUE(pl.small_image_url) AS image_url, NOW() AS calc_time, #{batchNo} AS batch_no, 0 AS current_flag FROM amz_warehouse_inventory_detail wd LEFT JOIN amz_product_listing pl ON pl.local_sku = wd.sku LEFT JOIN shop_list sl ON sl.sid = pl.sid AND sl.platform_code = '10001' LEFT JOIN amz_product_category pc ON pc.sid = pl.sid AND pc.seller_sku = pl.seller_sku LEFT JOIN amz_order_profit op ON op.sid = pl.sid AND op.seller_sku = pl.seller_sku LEFT JOIN amz_restock_summary rs ON rs.sid = pl.sid AND rs.msku = pl.seller_sku LEFT JOIN warehouse wh ON wh.wid = wd.wid LEFT JOIN amz_replenishment_formula_config fc ON fc.enabled = 1 AND FIND_IN_SET(wh.name, fc.marketplaces) > 0 GROUP BY COALESCE(pl.sid, 0), pl.seller_sku, wd.sku
mapper.select: select distinct t.`${column}` from amz_replenishment_snapshot t where t.current_flag = 1 and t.`${column}` is not null and t.`${column}` != '' and t.`${column}` like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') order by t.`${column}` limit 50

SELECT s.id, s.sid, s.seller_sku, s.warehouse_sku, s.warehouse_name, s.asin, s.principal_name, s.store_name, s.image_url, COALESCE(o.product_category, s.product_category) AS product_category, COALESCE(o.remark, '') AS remark, s.rating, s.review_count, s.ad_rate, s.profit_rate_30d, s.refund_rate_90d, s.tag_name, s.purchased_qty AS purchased_qty, s.domestic_stock, s.pending_ship_qty, s.fba_stock, s.fba_inbound, s.total_inventory, s.sales_7d, s.sales_14d, s.sales_30d, s.sales_60d, s.sales_speed_14d, s.sales_speed_30d, s.sales_speed_60d, s.avg_monthly_sales, s.safety_stock, s.ship_qty, s.replenish_qty, s.restock_days, s.calc_time FROM amz_replenishment_snapshot s LEFT JOIN amz_replenishment_override o ON CAST(s.sid AS CHAR) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = o.sid AND s.seller_sku = o.seller_sku
and s.current_flag = 1 and s.store_name like concat('%', #{storeName}, '%') and s.seller_sku like concat('%', #{sellerSku}, '%') and s.warehouse_sku like concat('%', #{warehouseSku}, '%') and s.asin like concat('%', #{asin}, '%') and s.principal_name like concat('%', #{principalName}, '%') and COALESCE(o.product_category, s.product_category) like concat('%', #{productCategory}, '%')

choose.otherwise: order by CASE WHEN s.seller_sku IS NULL OR s.seller_sku = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, s.store_name asc, s.seller_sku asc

mapper.update: UPDATE amz_replenishment_snapshot SET current_flag = CASE WHEN batch_no = #{batchNo} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
